fear.desc_long: Passive. Enemies within 6" suffer -1 die on Morale tests.

terror.desc_long: Passive. When enemy first engages, they must test Morale or become Shaken. Once per round per enemy.

dread.desc_long: Passive. Enemies within 6" suffer -1 die on Morale and cannot ignore Shaken.

intimidate.desc_long: Main Action. Force Morale test on enemy within 6" and LoS. No effect on Titans.

rally.desc_long: Main Action. Remove Shaken from friendly within 6"; they gain +1 die on next Morale test.

terrifying_presence.desc_short: Nearby enemies test Morale on kills.
terrifying_presence.desc_long: Passive. When reducing enemy to 0 Quality, all enemies within 6" must test Morale.

unnerving.desc_long: Passive. Engaged enemies suffer -1 die on all attacks.

panic_wave.desc_long: Reaction. Reactive. When enemy within 6" Panics or Dies, choose another enemy within 6" to test Morale.

fearless.desc_long: Passive. Ignores Fear, Terror, and Dread. Still tests Morale for Damage and Terrain.

cowardice.desc_long: Passive. Enemies failing Morale within 6" suffer -1 die on their next Action.

inspire.desc_long: Passive. Friendly units within 6" gain +1 to Morale checks.

unshakable.desc_long: Passive. Auto-passes all Morale checks. Ignores Dread effects.

skittish.desc_long: Passive. This model must test Morale the first time each round an enemy model enters within 6".

audio_suppression.desc_long: Passive. Enemies within 6" suffer -1 to Morale checks.

authority.desc_long: Passive. Friendly units within 6" ignore Suppression effects.

command_presence.desc_short: Friendly units nearby re-roll failed Morale tests once per round.
command_presence.desc_long: Passive. Friendly units within 6" of this unit may re-roll one failed Morale test per round. This re-roll must be taken; the second result stands. If this unit is Shaken or destroyed, Command Presence is suspended until the start of this unit's next activation.
